mapper.select:
select t1.id , t1.secret_level , t1.project_id , t1.project_name , t1.task_id , t1.task_name , t1.sub_project_id , t1.sub_project_code , t1.sub_project_name , t1.pf_gg , t1.pf_xg , t1.pf_xnzb , t1.pf_type , t1.pf_num , t1.ys_gg , t1.ys_xnzb , t1.ys_xg , t1.ys_zzcs , t1.ys_ccrq_date , t1.ys_ccbh , t1.ys_zys_date , t1.ys_dh_date , t1.ys_user , t1.ys_dept , t1.ys_ysjl , t1.ys_idea , t1.hpj_date , t1.hpj_dept , t1.hpj_user , t1.hpj_yyxg , t1.hpj_sxjz , t1.hpj_czwt , t1.created_by , t1.creation_date , t1.last_updated_by , t1.last_update_date , t1.last_update_ip , t1.version , t1.created_dept , t1.org_identity , t1.attribute_01 , t1.attribute_02 , t1.attribute_03 , t1.attribute_04 , t1.attribute_05 , t1.attribute_06 , t1.attribute_07 , t1.attribute_08 , t1.attribute_09 , t1.attribute_10 from pm_project_ys_hpj t1
and t1.ID =#{bean.id}
and t1.SECRET_LEVEL like concat(concat('%',#{bean.secretLevel}),'%')
and t1.PROJECT_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.projectId}),'%')
and t1.PROJECT_NAME like concat(concat('%',#{bean.projectName}),'%')
and t1.TASK_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.taskId}),'%')
and t1.TASK_NAME like concat(concat('%',#{bean.taskName}),'%')
and t1.SUB_PROJECT_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.subProjectId}),'%')
and t1.SUB_PROJECT_CODE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.subProjectCode}),'%')
and t1.SUB_PROJECT_NAME like concat(concat('%',#{bean.subProjectName}),'%')
and t1.PF_GG like concat(concat('%',#{bean.pfGg}),'%')
and t1.PF_XG like concat(concat('%',#{bean.pfXg}),'%')
and t1.PF_XNZB like concat(concat('%',#{bean.pfXnzb}),'%')
and t1.PF_TYPE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.pfType}),'%')
and t1.PF_NUM like concat(concat('%',#{bean.pfNum}),'%')
and t1.YS_GG like concat(concat('%',#{bean.ysGg}),'%')
and t1.YS_XNZB like concat(concat('%',#{bean.ysXnzb}),'%')
and t1.YS_XG like concat(concat('%',#{bean.ysXg}),'%')
and t1.YS_ZZCS like concat(concat('%',#{bean.ysZzcs}),'%')
and t1.YS_CCRQ_DATE >= #{bean.ysCcrqDateBegin}
and t1.YS_CCRQ_DATE <= #{bean.ysCcrqDateEnd}
and t1.YS_CCBH like concat(concat('%',#{bean.ysCcbh}),'%')
and t1.YS_ZYS_DATE >= #{bean.ysZysDateBegin}
and t1.YS_ZYS_DATE <= #{bean.ysZysDateEnd}
and t1.YS_DH_DATE >= #{bean.ysDhDateBegin}
and t1.YS_DH_DATE <= #{bean.ysDhDateEnd}
and t1.YS_USER like concat(concat('%',#{bean.ysUser}),'%')
and t1.YS_DEPT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.ysDept}),'%')
and t1.YS_YSJL like concat(concat('%',#{bean.ysYsjl}),'%')
and t1.YS_IDEA like concat(concat('%',#{bean.ysIdea}),'%')
and t1.HPJ_DATE >= #{bean.hpjDateBegin}
and t1.HPJ_DATE <= #{bean.hpjDateEnd}
and t1.HPJ_DEPT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.hpjDept}),'%')
and t1.HPJ_USER like concat(concat('%',#{bean.hpjUser}),'%')
and t1.HPJ_YYXG like concat(concat('%',#{bean.hpjYyxg}),'%')
and t1.HPJ_SXJZ like concat(concat('%',#{bean.hpjSxjz}),'%')
and t1.HPJ_CZWT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.hpjCzwt}),'%')
and t1.CREATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdBy}),'%')
and t1.CREATION_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.creationDate}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdatedBy}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateDate}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateIp}),'%')
and t1.VERSION like concat(concat('%',#{bean.version}),'%')
and t1.CREATED_DEPT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdDept}),'%')
and t1.ORG_IDENTITY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.orgIdentity}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_01 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute01}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_02 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute02}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_03 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute03}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_04 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute04}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_05 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute05}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_06 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute06}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_07 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute07}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_08 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute08}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_09 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute09}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_10 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute10}),'%')
and ${sfnConditions.sql}
and t1.ORG_IDENTITY =#{org}
order by t1.creation_date desc

select t1.id , t1.secret_level , t1.project_id , t1.project_name , t1.task_id , t1.task_name , t1.sub_project_id , t1.sub_project_code , t1.sub_project_name , t1.pf_gg , t1.pf_xg , t1.pf_xnzb , t1.pf_type , t1.pf_num , t1.ys_gg , t1.ys_xnzb , t1.ys_xg , t1.ys_zzcs , t1.ys_ccrq_date , t1.ys_ccbh , t1.ys_zys_date , t1.ys_dh_date , t1.ys_user , t1.ys_dept , t1.ys_ysjl , t1.ys_idea , t1.hpj_date , t1.hpj_dept , t1.hpj_user , t1.hpj_yyxg , t1.hpj_sxjz , t1.hpj_czwt , t1.created_by , t1.creation_date , t1.last_updated_by , t1.last_update_date , t1.last_update_ip , t1.version , t1.created_dept , t1.org_identity , t1.attribute_01 , t1.attribute_02 , t1.attribute_03 , t1.attribute_04 , t1.attribute_05 , t1.attribute_06 , t1.attribute_07 , t1.attribute_08 , t1.attribute_09 , t1.attribute_10 from pm_project_ys_hpj t1 where t1.id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into pm_project_ys_hpj
id,
secret_level,
project_id,
project_name,
task_id,
task_name,
sub_project_id,
sub_project_code,
sub_project_name,
pf_gg,
pf_xg,
pf_xnzb,
pf_type,
pf_num,
ys_gg,
ys_xnzb,
ys_xg,
ys_zzcs,
ys_ccrq_date,
ys_ccbh,
ys_zys_date,
ys_dh_date,
ys_user,
ys_dept,
ys_ysjl,
ys_idea,
hpj_date,
hpj_dept,
hpj_user,
hpj_yyxg,
hpj_sxjz,
hpj_czwt,
created_by,
creation_date,
last_updated_by,
last_update_date,
last_update_ip,
version,
created_dept,
org_identity,
attribute_01,
attribute_02,
attribute_03,
attribute_04,
attribute_05,
attribute_06,
attribute_07,
attribute_08,
attribute_09,
attribute_10,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{subProjectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{subProjectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{subProjectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{pfGg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{pfXg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{pfXnzb,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{pfType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{pfNum,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{ysGg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ysXnzb,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ysXg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ysZzcs,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ysCcrqDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{ysCcbh,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ysZysDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{ysDhDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{ysUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ysDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ysYsjl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ysIdea,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{hpjDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{hpjDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{hpjUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{hpjYyxg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{hpjSxjz,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{hpjCzwt,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{creationDate},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute07,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{attribute08,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{attribute09,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{attribute10,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

insert into pm_project_ys_hpj( id, secret_level, project_id, project_name, task_id, task_name, sub_project_id, sub_project_code, sub_project_name, pf_gg, pf_xg, pf_xnzb, pf_type, pf_num, ys_gg, ys_xnzb, ys_xg, ys_zzcs, ys_ccrq_date, ys_ccbh, ys_zys_date, ys_dh_date, ys_user, ys_dept, ys_ysjl, ys_idea, hpj_date, hpj_dept, hpj_user, hpj_yyxg, hpj_sxjz, hpj_czwt, created_by, creation_date, last_updated_by, last_update_date, last_update_ip, version, created_dept, org_identity, attribute_01, attribute_02, attribute_03, attribute_04, attribute_05, attribute_06, attribute_07, attribute_08, attribute_09, attribute_10)
select #{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.subProjectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.subProjectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.subProjectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.pfGg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.pfXg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.pfXnzb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.pfType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.pfNum,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.ysGg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.ysXnzb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.ysXg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.ysZzcs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.ysCcrqDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.ysCcbh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.ysZysDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.ysDhDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.ysUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.ysDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.ysYsjl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.ysIdea,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.hpjDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.hpjDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.hpjUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.hpjYyxg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.hpjSxjz,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.hpjCzwt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.creationDate}, #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.lastUpdateDate}, #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.version,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute07,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.attribute08,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.attribute09,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.attribute10,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} from dual
mapper.update:
update pm_project_ys_hpj
id =#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
secret_level =#{secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_id =#{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_name =#{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_id =#{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_name =#{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sub_project_id =#{subProjectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sub_project_code =#{subProjectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sub_project_name =#{subProjectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pf_gg =#{pfGg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pf_xg =#{pfXg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pf_xnzb =#{pfXnzb,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pf_type =#{pfType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pf_num =#{pfNum,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ys_gg =#{ysGg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ys_xnzb =#{ysXnzb,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ys_xg =#{ysXg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ys_zzcs =#{ysZzcs,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ys_ccrq_date =#{ysCcrqDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ys_ccbh =#{ysCcbh,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ys_zys_date =#{ysZysDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ys_dh_date =#{ysDhDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ys_user =#{ysUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ys_dept =#{ysDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ys_ysjl =#{ysYsjl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ys_idea =#{ysIdea,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hpj_date =#{hpjDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
hpj_dept =#{hpjDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hpj_user =#{hpjUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hpj_yyxg =#{hpjYyxg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hpj_sxjz =#{hpjSxjz,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hpj_czwt =#{hpjCzwt,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_by =#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
creation_date =#{creationDate},
last_updated_by =#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
last_update_date =#{lastUpdateDate},
last_update_ip =#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version =version+1,
created_dept =#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
org_identity =#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_01 =#{attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_02 =#{attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_03 =#{attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_04 =#{attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_05 =#{attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_06 =#{attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_07 =#{attribute07,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
attribute_08 =#{attribute08,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
attribute_09 =#{attribute09,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
attribute_10 =#{attribute10,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id} and version =#{version}

update pm_project_ys_hpj set id =#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, secret_level =#{secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_id =#{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_name =#{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_id =#{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_name =#{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sub_project_id =#{subProjectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sub_project_code =#{subProjectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sub_project_name =#{subProjectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pf_gg =#{pfGg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pf_xg =#{pfXg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pf_xnzb =#{pfXnzb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pf_type =#{pfType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pf_num =#{pfNum,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ys_gg =#{ysGg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ys_xnzb =#{ysXnzb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ys_xg =#{ysXg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ys_zzcs =#{ysZzcs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ys_ccrq_date =#{ysCcrqDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ys_ccbh =#{ysCcbh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ys_zys_date =#{ysZysDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ys_dh_date =#{ysDhDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ys_user =#{ysUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ys_dept =#{ysDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ys_ysjl =#{ysYsjl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ys_idea =#{ysIdea,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hpj_date =#{hpjDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, hpj_dept =#{hpjDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hpj_user =#{hpjUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hpj_yyxg =#{hpjYyxg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hpj_sxjz =#{hpjSxjz,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hpj_czwt =#{hpjCzwt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_by =#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creation_date =#{creationDate}, last_updated_by =#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_update_date =#{lastUpdateDate}, last_update_ip =#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version =version+1, created_dept =#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, org_identity =#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_01 =#{attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_02 =#{attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_03 =#{attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_04 =#{attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_05 =#{attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_06 =#{attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_07 =#{attribute07,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute_08 =#{attribute08,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute_09 =#{attribute09,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, attribute_10 =#{attribute10,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id} and version =#{version}

update.foreach: update pm_project_ys_hpj set id =#{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, secret_level =#{item.secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_id =#{item.projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_name =#{item.projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_id =#{item.taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_name =#{item.taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sub_project_id =#{item.subProjectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sub_project_code =#{item.subProjectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sub_project_name =#{item.subProjectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pf_gg =#{item.pfGg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pf_xg =#{item.pfXg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pf_xnzb =#{item.pfXnzb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pf_type =#{item.pfType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pf_num =#{item.pfNum,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ys_gg =#{item.ysGg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ys_xnzb =#{item.ysXnzb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ys_xg =#{item.ysXg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ys_zzcs =#{item.ysZzcs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ys_ccrq_date =#{item.ysCcrqDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ys_ccbh =#{item.ysCcbh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ys_zys_date =#{item.ysZysDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ys_dh_date =#{item.ysDhDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ys_user =#{item.ysUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ys_dept =#{item.ysDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ys_ysjl =#{item.ysYsjl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ys_idea =#{item.ysIdea,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hpj_date =#{item.hpjDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, hpj_dept =#{item.hpjDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hpj_user =#{item.hpjUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hpj_yyxg =#{item.hpjYyxg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hpj_sxjz =#{item.hpjSxjz,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hpj_czwt =#{item.hpjCzwt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_by =#{item.createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creation_date =#{item.creationDate}, last_updated_by =#{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_update_date =#{item.lastUpdateDate}, last_update_ip =#{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version =version+1, created_dept =#{item.createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, org_identity =#{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_01 =#{item.attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_02 =#{item.attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_03 =#{item.attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_04 =#{item.attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_05 =#{item.attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_06 =#{item.attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_07 =#{item.attribute07,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute_08 =#{item.attribute08,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute_09 =#{item.attribute09,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, attribute_10 =#{item.attribute10,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{item.id} and version =#{item.version};
